name: EMC Ontology (Enterprise Model Composition)
description: Orchestration hub that maps requirement scopes to ontology compositions across all 5 series (VE, PE, RCSG, Foundation, Orchestration), enabling filtered enterprise model assembly based on PFC/PFI/Product/ORG context with two-path competition (market-level + org-specific), agent-role bridge pattern, and CRT customer role taxonomy

components.entities: ScopingDimension, ContextLevel, RequirementCategory (9 incl FULFILMENT), OntologySeries, OntologyComposition, CompositionRule (8), GraphPattern (6), InstanceConfiguration (4 incl IMP-MEAT-UK), GraphScopeRule, ScopeCondition, ScopeAction, ComposedGraphSpec, CanonicalSnapshot, ProductEntityBinding, BindingType
components.relationships: 32 relationships including 14 cross-series orchestration bridges, 3 agent bridges, 8 graph-scope rule relationships, 1 product-entity binding, 1 fulfilment bridge
components.businessRules: 17 rules (14 mandatory, 3 advisory) in IF-THEN format — 8 composition rules + 7 graph-scope rules + 1 binding confidence + 1 fulfilment bridge required
components.crossSeriesBridges: VE (VSOM, OKR, CRT), PE (PPM, EA, AIAgent, OFM, LSC), RCSG (MCSB, GDPR via GRC-FW hub), Foundation (ORG, ORG-CONTEXT competitive), Market (INDUSTRY)

notes: v5.2.0 (F41.5): FULFILMENT category + IMP-MEAT-UK InstanceConfig — RequirementCategory-Fulfilment, OFM-ONT+LSC-ONT to PE-Series (10→12), CompositionRule-FulfilmentBridge (p8), GraphPattern-FulfilmentBridge, orchestratesFulfilment relationship, BR-FulfilmentBridgeRequired. v5.1.0 (F19.5): ProductEntityBinding with confidence scoring. v5.0.0 (F19.1): Graph-Scope Rule Ontology Modelling — 5 entity types, 8 relationships, 7 rules. v4.0.0: Two-path competition, agent-role bridge, CRT-ONT, VHF/ANTQ.
